children.text:
We are not just a bakery, we are not just bakers. In fact, we are just like you, a bunch
      of food lovers fascinated with sweet indulgence, who dreamt of creating an appetizing
      fairy land of divine delicacies that relishes the utmost desires.

Kindling it in the oven with our warmth and finally crafting the intricate creations in the
      form of some lip-smacking, soul-satisfying desserts. Without any additives you'll find in
      our products are an extra pitch of love, care and devotion!
